narrative.headline: What 2018 Chrysler Pacifica owners report most
narrative.summary: The most-reported pattern for this model centers on the engine and electrical system failing together while the vehicle is in motion or at a stop, leaving owners unable to proceed even with the ignition in the run position. A secondary cluster of complaints describes the powertrain and steering losing function progressively — warning systems dropping out, speed becoming restricted, and power steering disappearing — often in vehicles with very low accumulated mileage. Some incidents across multiple component areas involved fires or crashes.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle failing to move when commanded to drive, with the ignition showing as active and the shifter in drive but the engine not responding. · 6 fire · 5 crash · 2 injured

issues.sample: WE WERE DRIVING HOME AT NIGHT AND STOPPED ON A RED LIGHT IN AN INTERSECTION ON A HIGHWAY. WHEN IT WAS 'GO' OUR PACIFICA 2018 (400 MILES ON IT) DID NOT RUN. LIGHT IS  ON 'RUN', DIAL SHIFT ON DRIVE AND I DID NOT TURN OFF THE CAR. I STEPPED ON THE ACCELERATOR AGAIN BUT IT JUST WOULD
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report a simultaneous loss of electrical function concurrent with engine failure, occurring even in vehicles with very low mileage and while stopped at intersections. · 7 fire · 10 crash · 3 injured

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report a progressive loss of power while driving, with vehicle speed becoming restricted, warning systems failing in sequence, and the van eventually requiring a tow. · 4 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle shutting off unexpectedly — sometimes displaying a message to park and restart — and losing power steering in the process, which owners describe as dangerous. · 8 crash · 2 injured
